title: About Us - Colombo & Hurd, PL
content:
At Colombo & Hurd, our mission is to empower the world’s brightest professionals and entrepreneurs to achieve their immigration dreams in the United States. With a strong commitment to excellence, integrity, and client success, we deliver results, one professional, one family, and one case at a time.
Colombo & Hurd champions the individual, recognizing their talent, innovation, and global potential as key contributors to the United States’ societal and economic growth. The firm pairs sophisticated legal strategy with a deep understanding of its clients’ unique contributions, treating each case as an opportunity to elevate the innovators, leaders, and changemakers shaping the country’s future.
Founded in 2006, Colombo & Hurd has developed into a global law firm of more than 450 professionals, including over 30 immigration attorneys. We represent clients from over 100 countries and provide comprehensive legal services across areas of business immigration law.
Our firm has earned the AV Preeminent rating from Martindale-Hubbell, the highest distinction for legal ability and ethical standards, as well as an A+ rating from the Better Business Bureau. Our attorneys are frequently featured in national media as recognized authorities on immigration law.
As a firm established by immigrants, we bring a distinct perspective to our practice. Many of our attorneys and staff have personally experienced the immigration process, enabling us to combine professional knowledge with meaningful understanding. We work alongside innovators, visionaries, and leaders who are shaping the future of the United States.
We hold ourselves to the highest ethical standards. Honesty, respect, and accountability guide every interaction with our clients, our colleagues, and the broader community. We keep our word, take ownership of our actions, and build trust through consistency and transparency.
We pursue excellence relentlessly. Every petition, every strategy, and every detail reflects our commitment to accuracy, innovation, and superior results. By staying ahead of changes in immigration law and continuously improving our practice, we ensure that our clients receive the best possible representation
Working together creates a more enriching work environment and generates better results for our lives and our clients. We believe the creativity, energy, and spirit of cooperation that working together creates is of great value. We act with empathy and show up for each other.
We bring passion, energy, and determination to every case. Challenges do not deter us, they inspire us. With persistence and hard work, we fight for our clients’ futures and put 100% effort into achieving success.
Clear, proactive communication is the foundation of our relationships. We keep clients informed, colleagues connected, and ideas flowing freely. We share openly, listen carefully, and speak up with honesty, whether about progress, questions, or lessons learned. We commit to creating an authentic environment where information and ideas flow freely.
With over 20 years of excellence in immigration law, our attorneys combine deep knowledge with innovation to guide clients through even the most complex challenges. We are proud of our record:
- Over 10,000 approvals secured across visa and green card categories
- More than 2,500 EB-2 NIW and EB-1A petitions approved since 2023 alone
- 100% approval rate for EB-5 Visas
- Clients from over 100 countries
At Colombo & Hurd, we provide comprehensive immigration solutions for professionals, entrepreneurs, investors, and families. We specialize in self-sponsored visas, including the EB-2 National Interest Waiver (NIW) and EB-1A for individuals of extraordinary ability. Our services include:
- Permanent Residence through Employment: EB-1A , EB-2 NIW
- Employment Non-Immigrant Visas : O-1 , L-1A, L-1B
- Permanent Residence through Investment : EB-5 Visa
- Investment Non-Immigrant Visas : E-2 Visa
- Federal Immigration Litigation
Whether representing a scientist, engineer, multinational executive, investor, or family, we bring the same commitment to integrity, excellence, and results.
Colombo & Hurd is a firm built by immigrants, and that shared experience shapes a culture of respect, inclusion, and empathy. We celebrate diversity, not only among our clients from more than 100 countries, but also within our team of attorneys and professionals who bring unique perspectives and languages to the table.
Our culture is defined by collaboration and commitment. Every case is approached as a team effort, ensuring clients benefit from the collective insight of attorneys, former USCIS officers, and seasoned staff. We embrace innovation, using technology to keep clients informed and empowered at every step of their journey. Most importantly, our culture is about partnership. We don’t see immigration as paperwork, we see it as people’s futures. This belief drives us to advocate relentlessly, to listen deeply, and to treat every client’s dream as if it were our own.

## More than 20 years of Excellence in Immigration Law
